name: Helika
description: Web3 and gaming analytics platform combining on-chain, in-game and social data to power growth, retention and LiveOps.

seo.title: Helika — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: Helika: Web3 and gaming analytics platform combining on-chain, in-game and social data to power growth, retention and LiveOps.

when_to_use: On-chain + in-game data fusion for Web3 game analytics
Player retention and churn prediction for live ops
Social media and blockchain data combined for growth
NFT economy health monitoring for Web3 game studio
LiveOps event impact analysis for game updates

pros: Combines on-chain, in-game, and social data
Purpose-built for web3 and blockchain games
LiveOps insights tied to token and NFT activity
Strong partnerships with web3 game studios
cons: Narrow fit; useless for web2 games or SaaS
Young vendor tied to volatile web3 market
Data quality depends on chain and wallet coverage
review.verdict: The most credible analytics choice for web3 games; its fate is tied to whether web3 gaming becomes real.
review.best_for: Web3 and blockchain game studios needing unified on-chain, in-game, and social analytics.
review.not_for: Traditional web2 games, non-gaming products, or teams skeptical of web3 longevity.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
